memory.summary: I have a free afternoon and low energy. I can start the quick chore now to make progress before Thursday.
I made small progress on a trivial chore, boosting my energy slightly. I still have time before Thursday to continue this easy task.
After working on a trivial chore, I feel slightly more energized but still have time to continue this easy task before Thursday.
I realized procrastinating future_project increases Thursday stress, so I should work on it now instead of trivial chores.
Working on the Term project increased my progress to 0.41, but I now face higher stress and low energy before its due date in three days.
Working 2 hours on the Term project improved progress to 0.51, yet my stress and sleep debt remain high with only three days left.
I failed a trivial chore while pushing the Term project forward, confirming that my current stress and low energy make prioritizing easy tasks impossible.
Progress on the Term project increased to 0.65, but high stress and low energy persist with only three days remaining.
Progress on the Term project increased from 0.65 to 0.72, yet stress and sleep debt remain critically high with only three days left.
Worked 1 hour, increasing progress to 0.76 despite high stress and sleep debt. Three days remain before the deadline.
After only 4 hours of sleep, my energy is still high at 4.8 with no sleep debt, but stress remains critically elevated while I have just three days left to finish the project.
Progress on the Term project jumped to 0.95 after two hours, leaving only one day before the deadline with stress still elevated.
